description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a SAST job using the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. In the default test stage define a job named sast that first exports SP_VERSION by extracting the major and minor version from $CI_SERVER_VERSION, then runs a docker container with SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL (default 3), mounting the repository and Docker socket, using the image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/sast:$SP_VERSION and executes /app/bin/run /code. The sast job is allowed to fail, captures gl-sast-report.json as an artifact, and has no additional rules or deployment targets.
